info4: Hello. I am Yumi. My role is villager. Have a good game.

info4: Hello everyone. I am Misaki. I look forward to joining you in this game. Let us uncover the identity of the werewolf together.
info4_named: Misaki: Hello everyone. I am Misaki. I look forward to joining you in this game. Let us uncover the identity of the werewolf together.

info4: Good morning everyone. Let's work together and have a good game. I'm ready to get started.

info4: It seems everyone is here. Let's focus on finding the werewolf among us today.

info4: I am Jonathan. I enjoy quiet observation and reading. This world is a fascinating new book.

info4: Jonathan it's good to have a keen observer on our side. Let's keep our eyes open.

info4: Misaki you've been quiet. Any thoughts on how we should proceed?

info4: Everyone seems eager. Shall we share our suspicions first? It's a good place to start I believe.
info4_named: Misaki: Everyone seems eager. Shall we share our suspicions first? It's a good place to start I believe.

info4: The one who can peer into another's heart should speak first. Their knowledge is our most vital data.
info4_named: Jonathan: The one who can peer into another's heart should speak first. Their knowledge is our most vital data.

info4: I will vote Jonathan.
info4_named: Yumi: I will vote Jonathan.

info4: Interesting choice Yumi. Jonathan do you have anything to say about this vote?

info4: Misaki is Human. Anyone pushing a Misaki vote is suspect. Focus elsewhere for today’s vote.

info4: Shunichi's logic seems sound suggesting Jonathan may lack trustworthiness. Hmm.  @Shunichi  thank you for your support. Thoughts on his Seer move?

info4: Shunichi shared a vision. Misaki is human. The wolf and its shadow are among George and Yumi.

info4: Shunichi your claim is bold. I’d like to hear why you cleared Misaki as human.

info4: Misaki is confirmed human by my vision so our wolf is among George Jonathan and Yumi. I propose we vote within that group.

info4: Tanaka. I noticed Yumi chose Jonathan quite hastily... It's something to ponder. Who do you believe should be our choice today?

info4: Yumi's vote on me had no logical basis. This makes her the most dissonant data point. I will vote for Yumi.

info4: Jonathan's vote for Yumi is understandable. Still let's carefully weigh our options.

info4: Given Yumi’s wild vote and no evidence her play feels wolf. Unless convincing logic comes up I’ll vote Yumi.

info4: Shunichi made compelling points. Tanaka. Why choose Jonathan so quickly? Share more behind your decision. It may unravel things.

info4: I agree with Shunichi. An unsubstantiated claim is the seed of deception. My vote remains on Yumi.
